evidence_summary: Minerva Neurosciences acquired Mind-NRG SA (also referred to as Mind-NRG Sarl) in February 2014. According to SEC filings and company press releases, Mind-NRG became a wholly-owned subsidiary of Minerva Neurosciences following the acquisition. The transaction provided Minerva with the exclusive global rights to develop and commercialize MIN-301, a compound for Parkinson's disease. Recent filings from 2025 and 2026 continue to identify Mind-NRG as a wholly-owned subsidiary of Minerva Neurosciences.
